title: cirsium furusei
intro: Cirsium furusei, also known as Furuse thistle or Japanese thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Cirsium furusei include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Cirsium furusei is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine and other Eastern healing practices.
